rules.title: CI security authority must stay explicit
evidence: lesson:CircleCI security-scan may report Snyk status, but dependency/security blocking authority must stay aligned with external required checks and the repo contract.
rules.removalCondition: Retire only after dependency/security blocking authority is intentionally migrated and the replacement required-check contract is green on main.
rules.notes: This rule exists because the Snyk/CircleCI recovery showed how report-only lanes, external required checks, and generated config can drift when authority is implicit.

rules.title: Legacy CircleCI Snyk orb is not the blocking dependency authority
rules.removalCondition: Remove this retired entry once all CI templates and docs reference ci-security-authority-is-explicit instead of legacy Snyk orb blocking semantics.
rules.notes: Kept temporarily as a deprecated example so agents learn to retire old guardrails instead of letting them fossilize.
